query: SELECT title, imageUrl, phaseId FROM works WHERE title LIKE '%Above%Below%' OR title LIKE '%Theatre%Memory%' OR title LIKE '%Celestial Secrets 8%' OR title LIKE '%Gravity%Well%' OR title LIKE '%Therion%' OR title LIKE '%Covenant%' OR title LIKE '%Ink Storm%' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Y9wzvyJgsWeM7p.fc93ab011512 --database ZLCef8c8rdYgPCof2teogL --execute SELECT title, imageUrl, phaseId FROM works WHERE title LIKE '%Above%Below%' OR title LIKE '%Theatre%Memory%' OR title LIKE '%Celestial Secrets 8%' OR title LIKE '%Gravity%Well%' OR title LIKE '%Therion%' OR title LIKE '%Covenant%' OR title LIKE '%Ink Storm%' LIMIT 20;
